title: Earnings call transcript: Vir Biotechnology beats Q4 2025 earnings expectations
text: Vir Biotechnology reported Q4 2025 earnings results on February 23, 2026, posting earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.31, which exceeded analysts' expectations of -$0.47. Revenue came in at $64.07 million against an estimate of $18.67 million, resulting in a 243.17% surprise. The large revenue beat was primarily driven by the $64.3 million license payment from Norgine, which closed in December 2025. During the Q4 2025 earnings call, the company provided guidance indicating completion of enrollment in the ECLIPSE 1 Phase III study for hepatitis delta, with primary completion expected by Q4 2026 and top-line data by Q1 2027. Future EPS forecasts suggest continued challenges, with projections of -$0.67 for Q1 2026 and -$3.16 for the full year 2026. The company announced the Astellas collaboration for up to $1.7 billion and highlighted the strong progress in clinical development programs including positive SOLSTICE Phase 2 data showing 88% of patients achieved undetectable HDV RNA with combination therapy.
